title: Le secret des roches du Choungui à Mayotte 🏔️
hook: Et si ces rochers au sommet cachaient une histoire interdite ?

scenes.narration: À Mayotte, une légende raconte que ces sept pierres mystérieuses seraient en réalité les sœurs punies pour leur désobéissance, changées en rochers pour toujours.
visuals: aerial drone shot of Choungui mountain shrouded in morning mist
close-up of seven distinct rock formations at the summit
elderly Mahorais storyteller pointing towards the mountain peak
dramatic wide shot of the mountain against a stormy sky
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of Choungui mountain in Mayotte, shrouded in early morning mist, with seven distinct rock formations at the summit resembling human silhouettes. The sky is moody with dramatic clouds, and warm golden light breaks through, casting long shadows. The scene feels mystical and ancient, with lush green vegetation at the base of the mountain, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Une légende raconte que sept sœurs furent transformées en pierre au sommet du Choungui

scenes.narration: Et aujourd’hui encore, les Mahorais racontent comment ces sept femmes ont bravé l’interdit en gravissant le Choungui, défiant un esprit bien plus puissant qu’elles.
visuals: wide shot of Choungui mountain rising above the lush landscape
close-up of a Mahorais elder touching the bark of an ancient tree
medium shot of a group of locals looking up at the mountain reverently
detail shot of offerings or sacred symbols at the mountain's base
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of Choungui mountain, the sacred emblem of Mayotte, rising majestically above a dense, tropical forest. The mountain is bathed in warm, soft light, with a few locals standing at its base, looking up in reverence. The scene is serene and mystical, with ancient trees and subtle signs of offerings or sacred symbols visible at the foot of the mountain, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Elles auraient désobéi à un esprit ancestral en montant sur la montagne sacrée

scenes.narration: Elles auraient osé fouler ce sol sacré où même les anciens tremblaient, déclenchant la colère d’un esprit gardien du sommet.
visuals: medium shot of a young Mahorais woman looking conflicted, glancing up at the mountain
close-up of footsteps in the dirt leading up a steep path
wide shot of the mountain’s steep, rocky trail under a stormy sky
detail shot of a hand brushing against a warning sign or sacred mark
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 cinematic shot capturing the tension of disobedience. A young Mahorais woman stands at the base of Choungui mountain, her expression conflicted as she glances up at the steep, rocky trail. The sky is dark and stormy, with dramatic clouds swirling above the peak. Her bare feet are visible in the dirt, as if she has paused mid-step, torn between curiosity and fear. The scene feels charged with emotion and foreboding, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Elles auraient désobéi à un esprit ancestral en montant sur la montagne sacrée

scenes.narration: À Mayotte, une légende raconte que ces femmes courageuses auraient traversé le lagon pour échapper à un mariage imposé contre leur volonté.
visuals: medium shot of a group of young women huddled together in fear
close-up of a traditional Mahorais wedding garment or jewelry
wide shot of a dense forest where the sisters might have fled
detail shot of a tear rolling down a young woman’s cheek
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a group of seven young Mahorais women huddled together in a dense, shadowy forest at the base of Choungui mountain. Their faces are filled with fear and determination as they clutch each other, looking over their shoulders. One of them wears a fragment of traditional wedding jewelry, glinting in the dim light. The atmosphere is tense and emotional, with the towering mountain looming in the background, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Selon une variante, elles cherchaient à se cacher d'un mariage forcé

scenes.narration: Et selon les Mahorais, leur punition divine aurait figé leurs silhouettes en ces rochers qui dominent encore aujourd’hui le sommet du Choungui.
visuals: extreme close-up of a rock formation resembling a human face
aerial shot of the seven rock silhouettes against the sky
medium shot of a local explaining the legend to a child
detail shot of lichen or moss growing on the rocks, adding texture
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 cinematic close-up of one of the seven rock formations at the summit of Choungui mountain. The rock eerily resembles a human face, with hollows for eyes and a downturned mouth, as if frozen in sorrow. The camera pulls back to reveal all seven silhouettes against a stormy sky, their shapes unmistakably human. The scene is dramatic and haunting, with lichen and moss adding texture to the ancient stones, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Les rochers au sommet seraient leurs silhouettes pétrifiées

scenes.narration: Et quand le soleil se couche sur ces pierres, les Mahorais ressentent encore l’émotion de cette légende qui fait vibrer leur montagne sacrée.
visuals: medium shot of a family looking up at the mountain with awe
close-up of a child’s hand pointing at one of the rock formations

detail shot of a local touching a rock with reverence

scenes.narration: Cette légende rappelle aux Mahorais que respecter la nature et écouter les sages, c’est protéger l’âme de leur île pour les générations futures.

close-up of a child listening intently to the story
wide shot of the mountain framed by ancient, gnarled trees

A group of children gather around, listening intently as the elder gestures towards the mountain, recounting the legend of the seven sisters. The children’s eyes are wide with wonder, and one of them holds a notebook filled with drawings of the rock formations. The scene is warm and intimate, with dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.

scenes.narration: Et aujourd’hui encore, les grands-parents mahorais murmurent cette histoire aux enfants pour leur apprendre que la montagne écoute ceux qui savent l’honorer.
